title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
